suite.name: Portfolio

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/mnt/c/Users/karin/Documents/ty\u00f6/cv-portfolio/browser/traces/temp/a21c82ca-4638-4505-af47-facd7df8fa3d"}
Starting Browser process /home/karine/robot-venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/Browser/wrapper/index.js using at 127.0.0.1:48355

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":true,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"/mnt/c/Users/karin/Documents/työ/cv-portfolio/browser/traces/temp/a21c82ca-4638-4505-af47-facd7df8fa3d"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

test.name: Home Page Loads Successfully

kw.name: Open CV Portfolio
Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${url} = http://localhost:3000
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="hero-title"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Open the portfolio at BASE_URL with an optional path or hash.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.msg: Title: 'CV Portfolio | Software Tester & QA Engineer'
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Element By Test Id Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="hero-title"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert an element with data-testid is visible.

test.doc: TC-001: Home page opens and hero section is displayed.

test.name: Main Navigation Links Are Visible

kw.name: Open CV Portfolio
Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${url} = http://localhost:3000
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="hero-title"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Open the portfolio at BASE_URL with an optional path or hash.

kw.name: Create List
kw.msg: @{links} = [ Home | About | Skills | QA Portfolio | Projects | CV | Contact ]
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Navigation Link Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector role=navigation[name="Main navigation"] >> role=link[name="Home"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert a main navigation link is visible by accessible name.

kw.name: Navigation Link Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector role=navigation[name="Main navigation"] >> role=link[name="About"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert a main navigation link is visible by accessible name.

kw.name: Navigation Link Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector role=navigation[name="Main navigation"] >> role=link[name="Skills"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert a main navigation link is visible by accessible name.

kw.name: Navigation Link Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector role=navigation[name="Main navigation"] >> role=link[name="QA Portfolio"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert a main navigation link is visible by accessible name.

kw.name: Navigation Link Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector role=navigation[name="Main navigation"] >> role=link[name="Projects"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert a main navigation link is visible by accessible name.

kw.name: Navigation Link Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector role=navigation[name="Main navigation"] >> role=link[name="CV"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert a main navigation link is visible by accessible name.

kw.name: Navigation Link Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector role=navigation[name="Main navigation"] >> role=link[name="Contact"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert a main navigation link is visible by accessible name.

test.doc: TC-002: All primary navigation links are visible in the header.

test.name: Projects Section Is Visible

kw.name: Open CV Portfolio
Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${url} = http://localhost:3000/#projects
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000/#projects
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="hero-title"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Open the portfolio at BASE_URL with an optional path or hash.

kw.name: Section Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#projects at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert a page section is present by HTML id.

kw.name: Section Heading Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#projects-heading at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Projects']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.
Assert a section heading is visible by its element id.

test.doc: TC-003: Projects section and at least one project card are visible.

test.name: QA Testing Project Section Is Visible

kw.name: Open CV Portfolio
Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${url} = http://localhost:3000/#qa-testing
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000/#qa-testing
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="hero-title"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Open the portfolio at BASE_URL with an optional path or hash.

kw.name: Section Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#qa-testing at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert a page section is present by HTML id.

kw.name: Section Heading Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#qa-heading at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['QA portfolio project']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.
Assert a section heading is visible by its element id.

test.doc: TC-004: QA portfolio project section and artefacts are visible.

test.name: Contact Form Shows Validation Errors When Submitted Empty

kw.name: Open Contact Section
Open CV Portfolio
Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${url} = http://localhost:3000/#contact
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000/#contact
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="hero-title"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Open the portfolio at BASE_URL with an optional path or hash.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="contact-form"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Navigate directly to the contact form section.

kw.name: Submit Contact Form
Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=[data-testid="contact-submit"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
Click the contact form submit button.

kw.name: Text By Test Id Should Contain
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="contact-name-error"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Name is required']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.
Assert element text contains expected string.

kw.name: Text By Test Id Should Contain
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="contact-email-error"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Email is required']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.
Assert element text contains expected string.

kw.name: Text By Test Id Should Contain
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="contact-message-error"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Message is required']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.
Assert element text contains expected string.

test.doc: TC-005: Empty submit triggers client-side validation on all required fields.

test.name: Contact Form Rejects Invalid Email

kw.name: Open Contact Section
Open CV Portfolio
Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${url} = http://localhost:3000/#contact
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000/#contact
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="hero-title"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Open the portfolio at BASE_URL with an optional path or hash.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="contact-form"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Navigate directly to the contact form section.

kw.name: Fill Contact Form
Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Test User' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'not-an-email' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'This message has enough characters.' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
Fill all contact form fields using stable data-testid selectors.

kw.name: Submit Contact Form
Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=[data-testid="contact-submit"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
Click the contact form submit button.

kw.name: Text By Test Id Should Contain
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="contact-email-error"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Invalid email address']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.
Assert element text contains expected string.

test.doc: TC-006: Invalid email format shows a clear validation message.

test.name: Contact Form Accepts Valid Input And Shows Success Message

kw.name: Open Contact Section
Open CV Portfolio
Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${url} = http://localhost:3000/#contact
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000/#contact
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="hero-title"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Open the portfolio at BASE_URL with an optional path or hash.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="contact-form"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Navigate directly to the contact form section.

kw.name: Fill Contact Form
Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Test User' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'test@example.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'This is a valid test message for the contact form.' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.arg: This is a valid test message for the contact form.
kw.doc: Fill all contact form fields using stable data-testid selectors.

kw.name: Submit Contact Form
Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=[data-testid="contact-submit"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
Click the contact form submit button.

kw.name: Text By Test Id Should Contain
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="contact-success"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Contact request received']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.
Assert element text contains expected string.

test.doc: TC-007: Valid form submission shows success feedback from the API.

test.name: CV Download And Link Are Visible

kw.name: Open CV Portfolio
Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${url} = http://localhost:3000/#cv
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000/#cv
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="hero-title"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Open the portfolio at BASE_URL with an optional path or hash.

kw.name: Section Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#cv at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert a page section is present by HTML id.

kw.name: Element By Test Id Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="cv-download"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert an element with data-testid is visible.

kw.name: Element By Test Id Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="cv-linkedin"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert an element with data-testid is visible.

test.doc: TC-008: CV download button and LinkedIn link are visible.

test.name: Language Toggle Placeholder Is Visible

kw.name: Open CV Portfolio
Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${url} = http://localhost:3000
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="hero-title"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Open the portfolio at BASE_URL with an optional path or hash.

kw.name: Element By Test Id Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="language-toggle"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Assert an element with data-testid is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['EN']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

test.doc: TC-009: FI/EN language toggle placeholder is visible and clickable.

test.name: Page Title And Main Heading Are Correct

kw.name: Open CV Portfolio
Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${url} = http://localhost:3000
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="hero-title"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Open the portfolio at BASE_URL with an optional path or hash.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.msg: Title: 'CV Portfolio | Software Tester & QA Engineer'
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Text By Test Id Should Contain
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-testid="hero-title"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Quality assurance and test automation']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.
Assert element text contains expected string.

test.doc: TC-010: Browser title and primary h1 heading match expected content.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: UI tests for the CV Portfolio website (software tester / QA focus). Requires the app running at BASE_URL (default http://localhost:3000).
